title: Trying to delete a ›for-car-model-variant‹ relationship with invalid CAR MODEL VARIANT ID
gherkin:
Given there exists a "RATING" "invalid rating"
And "CAR MODEL VARIANT" "McLaren 750S" does NOT exist
When the user deletes the "for car model variant" relationship between "invalid rating" and "McLaren 750S"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
